title: Benefits and Services Assistance * Medicaid Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Benefits and Services Assistance * Medicaid Recipients 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Answers questions about coverage packets, benefits, and ID cards. Assists OHP members on how to resolve problems involving access or quality of care. Investigates allegations of inappropriate denials of covered benefits. Helps members to navigate through a system of Coordinated Care Organizations. Researches and resolves medical bills received by OHP clients. Receives and records client complaints about misuse or inappropriate disclosure of the client's private health information. Assists members with Open Card to resolve problems with filling prescriptions. 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Enrolled OHP clients Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (800) 273-0557 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT
